snippets.description:
CancelAutomationRun cancels an AutomationRun. The `state` of the `AutomationRun` after
cancelling is `CANCELLED`. `CancelAutomationRun` can be called on
AutomationRun in the state `IN_PROGRESS` and `PENDING`; AutomationRun
in a different state returns an `FAILED_PRECONDITION` error.
snippets.title: clouddeploy CancelAutomationRun Sample

snippets.description:
SetIamPolicy sets the access control policy on the specified resource. Replaces
any existing policy.

Can return `NOT_FOUND`, `INVALID_ARGUMENT`, and `PERMISSION_DENIED`
errors.
snippets.title: clouddeploy SetIamPolicy Sample

snippets.description: TerminateJobRun terminates a Job Run in a given project and location.
snippets.title: clouddeploy TerminateJobRun Sample

snippets.description:
TestIamPermissions returns permissions that a caller has on the specified resource. If the
resource does not exist, this will return an empty set of
permissions, not a `NOT_FOUND` error.

Note: This operation is designed to be used for building
permission-aware UIs and command-line tools, not for authorization
checking. This operation may "fail open" without warning.
snippets.title: clouddeploy TestIamPermissions Sample
